parameterdescription.para: Vector pointing to the start of each SOC block in Wfull. Only used in the GPU (cone.cu) implementation.

memberdef.argsstring: (const QOCOFloat *u, const QOCOFloat *v, QOCOFloat *p, QOCOInt n)
memberdef.name: soc_product

briefdescription.para: Computes second-order cone product u * v = p.

parameterdescription.para: u = (u0, u1) is a vector in second-order cone of dimension n.
v = (v0, v1) is a vector in second-order cone of dimension n.
Cone product of u and v.

memberdef.argsstring: (const QOCOFloat *lam, const QOCOFloat *v, QOCOFloat *d, QOCOInt n)
memberdef.name: soc_division

briefdescription.para: Commpues second-order cone division lambda # v = d.

parameterdescription.para: lam = (lam0, lam1) is a vector in second-order cone of dimension n.
v = (v0, v1) is a vector in second-order cone of dimension n.
Cone divisin of lam and v.

briefdescription.para: Computes residual of vector u with respect to the second order cone of dimension n.

parameterdescription.para: u = (u0, u1) is a vector in second-order cone of dimension n.

simplesect.para: Residual: norm(u1) - u0. Negative if the vector is in the cone and positive otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Computes u0^2 - u1'*u1 of vector u with respect to the second order cone of dimension n.

parameterdescription.para: u = (u0, u1) is a vector in second order cone of dimension n.

memberdef.argsstring: (const QOCOFloat *u, const QOCOFloat *v, QOCOFloat *p, QOCOInt l, QOCOInt nsoc, const QOCOInt *q, const QOCOInt *soc_idx)
memberdef.name: cone_product

briefdescription.para: Computes cone product u * v = p with respect to C.

parameterdescription.para: Cone product of u and v.
Array pointing to the start of each SOC block. Only used in the GPU (cone.cu) implementation.

memberdef.argsstring: (const QOCOFloat *lambda, const QOCOFloat *v, QOCOFloat *d, QOCOInt l, QOCOInt nsoc, const QOCOInt *q, const QOCOInt *soc_idx)
memberdef.name: cone_division

briefdescription.para: Computed cone division lambda # v = d.

parameterdescription.para: Cone quotient of lambda and v.
Array pointing to the start of each SOC block. Only used in the GPU (cone.cu) implementation.

memberdef.argsstring: (const QOCOFloat *u, QOCOInt l, QOCOInt nsoc, const QOCOInt *q)
memberdef.name: cone_residual

briefdescription.para: Computes residual of vector u with respect to cone C.

simplesect.para: Residual: Negative if the vector is in the cone and positive otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Performs u = u + (1 + a) * e where e is the cannonical vector for each cone LP Cone: e = ones(n), second-order cone: e = (1,0,0,...) and a is the minimum scalar value such that u + (1 + a) * e is in cone C.

parameterdescription.para: Array pointing to the start of each SOC block. Only used in the GPU (cone.cu) implementation.

memberdef.argsstring: (QOCOFloat *W, QOCOInt *Wsoc_idx, QOCOInt *soc_idx, QOCOFloat *x, QOCOFloat *z, QOCOInt l, QOCOInt m, QOCOInt nsoc, QOCOInt *q)
memberdef.name: nt_multiply

briefdescription.para: Computes z = W * x where W is a full Nesterov-Todd scaling matrix. The NT scaling array for the LP cones are stored first, then the NT scalings for the second-order cones are stored in column major order.

parameterdescription.para: Vector pointing to the start of each SOC block in W. Only used in the GPU (cone.cu) implementation.
Array pointing to the start of each SOC block in x and z. Only used in the GPU (cone.cu) implementation.
Number of second-order cones in C.

briefdescription.para: Compute Nesterov-Todd scalings and scaled variables.

memberdef.argsstring: (const QOCOFloat *x, const QOCOFloat *dx, QOCOInt n, QOCOFloat alpha_max)
memberdef.name: lp_step_length

briefdescription.para: Compute maximum step length alpha >= 0 such that x + alpha * dx remains in the nonnegative orthant.

memberdef.argsstring: (const QOCOFloat *x, const QOCOFloat *dx, QOCOInt n, QOCOFloat alpha_max)
memberdef.name: soc_step_length

briefdescription.para: Compute maximum step length alpha >= 0 such that x + alpha * dx remains in the second-order cone.
Conducts linesearch to compute a \in (0, 1] such that u + (a / f) * Du \in C. For QPs this calls exact_linesearch() and for SOCPs this calls bisection_search()

memberdef.argsstring: (QOCOFloat *x, QOCOFloat a, QOCOInt l, QOCOInt nsoc, QOCOVectori *q)
memberdef.name: add_e

briefdescription.para: Computes x = x - a*e where e is the cannonical vector for the cone.
